author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tmux-perms
content: Plan: Add allowedTools to settings.json template with tmux and git worktree permission patterns. Create a write_settings_json_merged() function (similar to existing write_mcp_json_merged()) that merges allowedTools arrays on re-init rather than overwriting. Key files: crosslink/resources/claude/settings.json (template), crosslink/src/commands/init.rs (merge logic + tests). The template gets Bash(tmux *) and Bash(git worktree *) entries. The merge function reads existing settings.json, unions the allowedTools arrays, and overwrites hooks (which are crosslink-managed).
